title: Converge hooks/hooks.json and hooks/claude-hooks.json (guard + audit in both) + parity regression test
action: Per D5: hooks/claude-hooks.json (wired by .claude-plugin/plugin.json:8) carries the Agent|Task bee-model-guard but NO SubagentStart audit; hooks/hooks.json carries the SubagentStart bee-codex-subagent-audit but NO model guard. First establish from catalog.mjs and onboarding which file serves which install route (plugin vs repo-local) — if one is genuinely dead, prefer deleting it and pointing every consumer at the survivor (log that as the executed choice in the cell trace); otherwise converge BOTH to carry model guard + subagent audit + identical shared entries. Then write scripts/test_hook_manifest_parity.mjs asserting the two manifests (if both remain) are semantically equivalent (same events, same matchers, same command basenames — path prefixes may differ per route), and that the model-guard entry (matcher Agent|Task) and SubagentStart audit exist in every shipped Claude manifest. Wire the new test into the recorded verify chain ONLY if trivial; otherwise leave it standalone-runnable and note it for the S7 conformance wiring.

truths: every shipped Claude hook manifest carries both the Agent|Task model guard and the SubagentStart audit (or exactly one manifest survives and every consumer references it)
key_links: .claude-plugin/plugin.json hooks reference resolves to a manifest containing the model guard
prohibitions: No change to hook script implementations (bee-model-guard.mjs, bee-codex-subagent-audit.mjs) — manifests and test only
No weakening of any existing matcher

verify: bash -c 'node scripts/test_hook_manifest_parity.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && echo PARITY-OK'

trace.dropped_reason: Premise disproved during validation: hooks/hooks.json (Codex plugin projection) vs hooks/claude-hooks.json (Claude projection) differ BY DESIGN, both rendered from hooks/catalog.mjs single source with intentional differences pinned by the catalog drift-check + ALLOWED_DIFFERENCES (hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs:751+, cell codex-parity-2). No split-brain exists; audit is codex-only, model guard claude-only, deliberately.
